title: clitoria pinnata
intro: Clitoria pinnata, also known as asafetida or devil's weed, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clitoria pinnata include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve flatulence, and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of the plant include its leaves, roots, and seeds, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it medicinally.
